group-scs.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and services Group SCS AOV and smoke-control systems across the North West, with commissioning to BS 9991 and EN 12101. From roof vents and actuators to control panels, our engineers keep life-safety smoke extract reliable for landlords, developers and FM teams. Trade spares and certification paperwork are available from our Stockport base for Greater Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire sites.

haes-systems.blurb: Icomply is a North West installer and service partner for Haes Systems fire detection panels, covering new BS 5839 installs, upgrades and reactive call-outs. We support conventional and addressable Haes kits for offices, industrial units and multi-site portfolios, with full certification and log-book updates. Trade engineers can also pick up panel batteries, zone cards and device packs through our Stockport trade shop.

hager.blurb: Icomply supplies and installs Hager consumer units, distribution boards and circuit protection across the North West, working to BS 7671 with full EIC and EICR certification. Whether you need a board upgrade, EV-ready distribution or planned electrical maintenance, our electricians specify genuine Hager breakers and accessories. Contractors and landlords can source trade Hager spares from our Stockport counter for Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire jobs.

hanwha-vision.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Hanwha Vision (formerly Samsung) IP CCTV for commercial and multi-residential sites across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. From Wisenet cameras and NVRs to remote viewing and scheduled maintenance, we deliver BS EN 62676-aligned systems with clear certification packs. Trade mounts, PoE accessories and storage upgrades are available for FM teams and security contractors via our Stockport trade shop.

hid-global.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains HID Global access control — readers, credentials and controllers — for offices, warehouses and residential blocks across the North West. We handle new door systems, card migrations and planned service visits with commissioning documentation to commercial best practice. Need spare iCLASS or Seos cards, reader modules or power supplies? Our Stockport trade counter supports contractors working Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire routes.

hikvision.blurb: Icomply is a North West Hikvision CCTV specialist — survey, install, NVR configuration and ongoing service for shops, estates and industrial parks. We specify ColorVu, AcuSense and multi-site recording solutions with tidy cabling and handover packs your insurers will accept. Trade cameras mounts, PoE injectors and HDD kits ship from our Stockport base to engineers across Manchester, Lancashire and Cheshire.

hikvision-ax-pro.blurb: Icomply installs and services Hikvision AX PRO wireless and hybrid intruder alarms for homes, SMEs and multi-site portfolios across the North West. Systems are set out to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 with app monitoring, zone expansions and full certification on handover. Our trade shop stocks AX PRO PIRs, contacts, keypads and panel batteries for engineers covering Stockport, Manchester and surrounding counties.
